title: Improve background color accessibility and contrast

requirements.text: Audit and update the app's background and foreground color palette to ensure sufficient color contrast ratios (WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) across all pages and components. Replace or adjust any low-contrast earthy/sandy background colors (e.g., overly light sand tones, washed-out terracotta) with more accessible alternatives that retain the warm, adventurous visual identity. Update CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind tokens in frontend/tailwind.config.js accordingly, ensuring changes propagate consistently to all components including cards, headers, buttons, form inputs, and the footer.
acceptanceCriteria: All body text and headings meet WCAG AA contrast ratio (≥ 4.5:1) against their background colors.
Interactive elements (buttons, links) meet WCAG AA large-text contrast ratio (≥ 3:1).
The warm, earthy color identity (terracotta, forest green, sand tones) is preserved while using more accessible shade variants.
CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css are updated to reflect the accessible palette.
Tailwind config color tokens in frontend/tailwind.config.js are updated to match.
Changes are visually consistent across Home, ItineraryForm, ItineraryDetail, and all shared components (Layout, cards, forms).
No previously working UI elements are broken or lose their styling.

constraints: Do not alter immutable files: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, and frontend/src/components/ui.
Retain the warm, adventurous earthy visual theme — only adjust shades for accessibility, do not switch to an entirely different color scheme.
Do not modify any backend files.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall visual theme or switching away from the earthy/warm aesthetic.
